hero.title: About Dolphin Kids
hero.subtitle: A legacy of excellence in early and primary education since 2010.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide a joyful, inclusive, and stimulating learning environment that nurtures every child's intellectual curiosity, creativity, and social-emotional growth.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted international school in India — raising compassionate, confident, and globally-minded citizens.

values.title: Curiosity
values.description: We celebrate questions and encourage exploration.

values.title: Kindness
values.description: Empathy and respect are at the heart of our community.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We set high standards and support every child in reaching them.

values.title: Joy
values.description: Learning should be a delight, not a chore.
